purpose: Curated chart source for high-stakes generality SVGs. This is not a claim document; source ledgers remain authoritative.
brandFrame: Sundog tests whether signatures that work in one domain survive substrate changes, and publishes the walls as receipts.
brandUse: Use this data for SVG cards, a generality gallery, Ask Sundog claim-boundary answers, and future standalone project pages.
forbiddenLanguage: turns nulls into wins without review

projects.transferQuestion: Can Sundog-style projection and symmetry receipts find a useful structural edge in RH-adjacent zero data?
projects.currentRead: Three lanes returned bounded nulls by distinct causes; no structural-zero edge was found.
projects.blocker: External sanity review before any public-facing claim beyond bounded-null discipline.
projects.nextAction: Send the external-review email, record the response, and require a new preregistration for any reopened lane.
projects.publicBoundary: No RH proof, disproof, Hilbert-Polya operator, or new zero formula is claimed.

projects.transferQuestion: Does a one-cell finite-Galerkin C1 witness survive a Grashof-axis regime change?
projects.currentRead: The complete Reading-2 witness now holds at G=200 and G=300 under a portable objective.
projects.blocker: External PDE review and proxy-faithfulness work remain open before promotion.
projects.nextAction: Surface reviewer candidates or firm up proxy faithfulness with a derived objective selector.
projects.publicBoundary: No Navier-Stokes solution or infinite-dimensional theorem is claimed; C1 remains finite-Galerkin, sampled-support, and unpromoted.

projects.transferQuestion: Can a compact signature behave like a cheaper certificate for a bounded alignment-verification problem?
projects.currentRead: The v0-v5 chain closed multiple safety holes, but v5 is still cost-unadjudicated after environment-hash drift.
projects.blocker: Two quiescent v5 reruns are required before v6 or Phase 2 can be interpreted.
projects.nextAction: Rerun v5 twice, compare environment hashes and median cost, then finalize or void the provisional receipt.
projects.publicBoundary: No complexity-class result, polynomial certificate, or P-vs-NP progress is claimed.

projects.transferQuestion: Can a compact gauge-invariant signature preserve finite-lattice observable structure beyond controls?
projects.currentRead: Four pre-registered probes (3 signature vocabs x 2 target classes) on SU(2) 3D 12^3 all landed YM-P2-NEG-A; bounded-null synthesis filed.
projects.blocker: External lattice-gauge-theorist sanity check before any public claim beyond bounded-null discipline.
projects.nextAction: Send the external-review email, record the response; any reopened probe requires fresh external scientific motivation and a new dated preregistration.
projects.publicBoundary: No Yang-Mills existence, mass-gap, confinement, continuum-limit, or Clay-problem claim is licensed.
projects.pageHeadline: Four pre-registered probes, one bounded cell-local null on SU(2) 3D 12^3 - lattice-gauge review packet drafted.

projects.transferQuestion: After exact-grid decoder floors, does the signature still preserve rank-local program-sketch geometry?
projects.currentRead: Seven exact-grid floors stand; expanded absolute fibers stayed sparse and surfaced oracle leakage on the 108-task register.
projects.blocker: Relative-locality tooling must be admitted with wiring, result path, leak checks, smoke fingerprint, and freeze marker before receipt runs.
projects.nextAction: Admit the runner as tooling, run smoke only if under the ten-minute rule, and stage the full command if needed.
projects.publicBoundary: No ARC solver, benchmark-performance claim, or Blackwell-sufficiency proof is claimed.
projects.chartHeadline: absolute fibers sparse; relative test held

projects.transferQuestion: Does the Phase 15B normalizer-collapse diagnosis change when counterfactuals run over longer horizons?
projects.currentRead: The audit is implemented and smoke-passed; 6 of 12 lock shards are logged, but no candidate-split branch read exists yet.
projects.blocker: All shards and the candidate-envelope horizon table must land before interpretation.
projects.nextAction: Finish the remaining shards, aggregate the candidate-split readback, and keep pooled observations diagnostic only.
projects.publicBoundary: No Phase 15 verdict revision, controller retune, or claim upgrade is licensed by interim shard logs.
